facts.claim: Designed with our Chinese guests in mind, Quantum of the Seas is a fully immersive ship, complete with Mandarin speaking crew and local cuisines served onboard. Travel to the most sought-after cities to explore the cutting-edge architecture, stylish shops, and ancient temples.
Quantum of the Seas is a Quantum-class cruise ship currently operated by Royal Caribbean International and is the lead ship of her class.
At her time of delivery in 2014, Quantum of the Seas was the third largest cruise ship in the world by gross tonnage.
